intro: Dortmanna martagon, also known as Indian gentian or Gentiana martagon, is a plant species in the Gentianaceae family that is native to the Himalayan region and parts of Asia. The root of this plant has been used in traditional medicine for its health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, which may help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and protect against oxidative stress.
